title: BI Report Generated Event
description: Emitted when a BI analytics report is generated in the bi_analytics system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

report_id.description: Unique identifier of the generated report.

report_type.description: Type of the report (e.g. sales_summary, kpi_dashboard, trend_analysis).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the report was generated.

period_start.description: Start date of the report period (ISO 8601 format).

period_end.description: End date of the report period (ISO 8601 format).

metric_count.description: Number of metrics included in the report.

kpi_count.description: Number of KPIs included in the report.

summary_json.description: JSON string containing a summary or highlights of the report.

generated_by.description: Identifier of the user or system that triggered the report generation.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which the report is considered stale.
